title: Portfolio and OTC Market launch with early-stage investments built in
content_html:
Portfolio and OTC Market are live on Cryptool, and both have been extended to cover early-stage crypto investments out of the box.

Portfolio brings together:

  • One place to track every crypto holding
  • Status, vesting schedules and next unlock dates per position
  • Performance and historical trend tracking
  • Early-stage investments managed alongside the rest of the portfolio

OTC Market opens up:

  • Direct trading of both vested and unvested positions
  • Large-volume trade execution with reduced settlement risk
  • Access to exclusive early-stage investment opportunities
  • Transparent pricing and fast on-platform settlement

With this release the core Cryptool stack is complete: fundraising, portfolio management and OTC, on one platform, with no need to stitch together separate tools.
author: Cryptool
